summary_en: 500,000 shares (1.90% of outstanding), ¥584M upper limit, N-NET3 off-hours trading, single session execution May 18, 2026 at May 15 closing price of ¥1,168/share
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via N-NET3 Off-Hours Trading
translation_en_brief: On May 15, 2026, the board of Chubu Nippon Broadcasting (ticker 9402) authorized the acquisition of up to 500,000 treasury shares (1.90% of outstanding shares excluding treasury) for a maximum total consideration of ¥584M. The acquisition will be executed via N-NET3 off-hours trading on May 18, 2026 at the May 15 closing price of ¥1,168 per share. The company states the rationale as responding to current market conditions and share valuations through flexible capital allocation, improving capital efficiency, enhancing corporate value, and enriching shareholder returns. As of April 30, 2026, the company held 71,797 treasury shares against 26,328,203 outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock).
